**What & why**

**Checklist**
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] App still launches (`npm start`)
- [ ] New user-facing strings localized in both `en` and `uk` (`src/renderer/i18n/strings.js`)
- [ ] Keeps Nyx on-device / offline (no telemetry, no images stored)
